steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up with your email address and choose a secure password to get started.

steps.title: Verify Your Email
steps.description: Open the confirmation email and click the verification link to activate your account.

steps.title: Download the App
steps.description: Install the latest version of the app on your preferred device and sign in.

steps.title: Connect Your Device
steps.description: Pair your device using the on-screen instructions and confirm the connection.

steps.title: Set Your Preferences
steps.description: Adjust notifications, privacy settings, and display options to fit your workflow.

steps.title: Start Using It
steps.description: Complete the welcome tour and begin your first setup task with confidence.
